body:
For residents in Pleasanton, CA, both _Valiant Garage Door_ and _Precision Garage Door Service_ offer local repair and installation, but they differ in company size, service focus, and customer experience.

 _Valiant Garage Door_ (Local Focus)

  * **Service Area:** Highly local to Pleasanton, Livermore, Dublin, and San Ramon.
  * **Customer Experience:** Customer reviews often highlight personal service, with mentions of the owner (Valentino) being directly involved. They are described as prompt, communicative, and transparent with pricing.
  * **Services:** Specializes in repair, maintenance, and installation of garage doors and openers.
  * **Pros:** Personalized, small-business feel with high accountability. [Garage Door Repair](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-repair)[VALIANT GARAGE DOOR - Updated June 2026 - Yelp](https://m.yelp.com/biz/valiant-garage-door-pleasanton)[Choosing the Right Wood for Your Garage Doors: A Guide to Different Options - Precision Door LA BLog](https://precisiondoorla.com/blog/choosing-the-right-wood-for-your-garage-doors-a-guide-to-different-options/)

“"_Valiant Garage Door_ exceeded my expectations in every way. They responded quickly, showed up on time, and did excellent work on my garage." - Ed C.”

[Yelp](https://m.yelp.com/biz/valiant-garage-door-pleasanton)

Precision Garage Door (Large Franchise)

  * **Service Area:** A larger, well-established national franchise (Precision Door East Bay).
  * **Customer Experience:** Emphasizes professional, courteous, and non-stressful consultations for installations and repairs.
  * **Specialization:** Known for high-cycle, corrosion-resistant springs (rated for 30,000 cycles).
  * **Pros:** Large inventory, extensive warranties, and 24/7 availability. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton)[How Long Should a Garage Door Last?](https://precisiongarage-door.com/how-long-should-a-garage-door-last/)[VALIANT GARAGE DOOR - Updated June 2026 - Yelp](https://m.yelp.com/biz/valiant-garage-door-pleasanton)

“"What made our decision to choose Precision Door was the warm, courteous, professional, very helpful sale rep. It was a joy to meet with him." - John & Diane Blunden”

[Precision Garage Door East Bay](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton)

Comparison for Pleasanton Residents

  * **If you prefer a small local operator** with personalized service and direct owner involvement, **_Valiant Garage Door_** is highly rated for this.
  * **If you prefer a larger, well-known brand** with standardized service, 24/7 emergency availability, and extensive warranty options, **_Precision Garage Door_** is a strong choice.
  * **Repair Focus:** Both companies handle typical repairs (springs, rollers, cables) and offer opener services. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton)[VALIANT GARAGE DOOR - Updated June 2026 - Yelp](https://m.yelp.com/biz/valiant-garage-door-pleasanton)[Garage Door Repair](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-repair)[Valiant Garage Door Reviews - Pleasanton, CA | HomeAdvisor](https://www.homeadvisor.com/rated.ValiantGarageDoorLLC.161142799.html)

 _Disclaimer: Based on available reviews, both companies are well-regarded in the Pleasanton area._

If you want me to compare their warranty policies or check their current BBB ratings in more detail, just let me know.
